caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storm Hits St Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St Lucia is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds of 0 kt and wave heights of 5.2 ft, while Curacao is seeing winds of 17 kt. I expect the heavy rain in St Lucia to be the most impactful weather story in the region today, with minimal wind impact from the dominant eastern swell direction.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Seas Ahead
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing less than 10% rain probability with max winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 2.6 ft, while Mykonos has max winds of 0 kt. I expect smooth sailing for ships in the Mediterranean, with the dominant swell direction from the WNW at a swell period of 9 s, and no significant weather systems impacting the region today.
